value.found_quote: Codex automatically records traces that capture every prompt, tool call, and hand-off. After the multi-agent run completes, open the [Traces dashboard](https://platform.openai.com/trace) to inspect the execution timeline.
value.rationale: The page has a section titled "Trace the workflow" describing that Codex automatically records traces of prompts, tool calls, and hand-offs, viewable in the Traces dashboard, matching the claim.
